kpi.prompt: Retourenquote der letzten 30 Tage in Prozent: Wert retournierter Artikel geteilt durch Wert versendeter Artikel; ein einzelner Datensatz.
kpi.sql_string:
WITH order_items AS (
    SELECT
        so.sales_order_id,
        soi.sales_order_item_id,
        soi.net_price,
        soi.discount,
        soi.quantity,
        so.date AS order_date
    FROM sales_orders so
    JOIN sales_order_items soi
        ON so.sales_order_id = soi.sales_order_id
    LEFT JOIN projects proj
        ON so.project_id = proj.project_id
    WHERE
        so.status IN ('released', 'sent', 'completed')
        AND so.date >= DATEADD(day, -30, CURRENT_DATE)
        AND so.status NOT IN ('created', 'canceled', 'unknown')
        AND (proj.project_id IS NULL OR proj.project_id IS NOT NULL)
),
returned_quantities AS (
    SELECT
        rsi.sales_order_item_id,
        SUM(COALESCE(rsi.quantity, 0)) AS returned_quantity
    FROM return_shipment_items rsi
    JOIN return_shipments rs
        ON rs.return_shipment_id = rsi.return_shipment_id
    WHERE
        rsi.status IN ('released', 'sent', 'completed')
        AND rs.status IN ('released', 'sent', 'completed')
        AND rs.date >= DATEADD(day, -30, CURRENT_DATE)
    GROUP BY 1
)
SELECT
    COALESCE(
        ROUND(
            100 * SUM(oi.net_price * (1 - COALESCE(oi.discount, 0)) * COALESCE(rq.returned_quantity, 0))
            / NULLIF(SUM(oi.net_price * (1 - COALESCE(oi.discount, 0)) * oi.quantity), 0),
            2
        ),
        0
    ) AS retourenquote_prozent
FROM order_items oi
LEFT JOIN returned_quantities rq
    ON oi.sales_order_item_id = rq.sales_order_item_id;

en.title: Return rate
en.description: Share of shipped items returned over the last 30 days, by value.

de.title: Retourenquote
de.description: Anteil der retournierten Artikel der letzten 30 Tage, nach Wert.
